name: bot.mailbox/mailbox
description: Hosted mailbox.bot MCP server with 30 Streamable HTTP tools for outbound postal mail, certified mail, sandbox testing, inbound document context, postal threads, webhooks, and proof workflows.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token. Use an agent key (sk_agent_...) for autonomous agents, a sandbox key (sk_agent_test_...) for zero-charge testing on production endpoints, or a member key (sk_live_...) for personal use. Mint keys at https://mailbox.bot/mcp-install.
